mapper.select:
with id_list as ( select unnest(${unnest}::bigint[]) "id2") select
${ew.SqlSelect} from history, id_list
where true
${ew.customSqlSegment} and del_flag = false and history.id=id_list.id2

with id_list as ( select unnest(${unnest}::bigint[]) "${column}2") select
${ew.SqlSelect} from history, id_list
where true
${ew.customSqlSegment} and del_flag = false and history.${column} = id_list."${column}2"
